title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
summary: Tencent WorkBuddy is a desktop AI productivity agent that reads files, analyzes spreadsheets, generates reports and presentations, and connects to external tools via integrations. It features over 100 domain-expert agents, task automation through Slack/Telegram/Discord/WeChat, and a skill marketplace for extended capabilities.
writeup: The video covers Tencent WorkBuddy, a desktop AI productivity agent that reads files, analyzes spreadsheets, and generates reports and presentations while connecting to external tools through integrations. The concrete features include over 100 domain-expert agents, task automation routed through Slack, Telegram, Discord, and WeChat, and a skill marketplace for extending capabilities. It matters as an example of agentic workflows and multi-agent systems packaged into a single desktop application aimed at workflow automation.
